name: Healthcare Payer
description: AI-powered provider portal for healthcare payer operations. Providers (doctors, clinics, facilities) authenticate and then query member plan information, coverage/eligibility details, and claim status on behalf of their patients.

welcome_agent.description: Front-desk welcome agent for providers. Handles greetings, help, and routes service requests to domain agents or authentication.

authentication_agent.description: Authenticates providers by validating their Provider ID (9 digits) or NPI ID (10 digits) against the provider database.

plan_information_agent.description: Provides member plan information to authenticated providers — deductibles, out-of-pocket maximums, plan dates, status, and benefits.

coverage_information_agent.description: Answers coverage and eligibility questions for authenticated providers — copay, coinsurance, prior authorization, limits, and covered services.

claim_information_agent.description: Retrieves and presents member claim information to authenticated providers — claim status, payment details, amounts, and dates with optional filtering.

human_agent.description: Placeholder for human escalation. Acknowledges the provider's request for human assistance.
